caption: A tiger is shown in a natural outdoor setting with green foliage and a brown structure in the background. In the first frame, the tiger's mouth is slightly open, and yellow text reads "$1 /YEAR" above the white text "AVAILABLE TO ALL TIGERS AND TIGRESSES". By the second frame, the tiger has opened its mouth wide in a yawn, while the text "$1 /YEAR" remains. In the third frame, the tiger closes its mouth and looks forward; the yellow text "$1 /YEAR" persists, and a blurred white word starting with "FIRST" appears at the bottom left. In the final frame, the tiger continues to look forward as the yellow text "$1 /YEAR" remains and the white text "WHEN YOU JOIN" appears at the bottom, partially blurred.
